name: Chris Brubeck
abstract: Christopher William Brubeck (born March 19, 1952) is an American musician and composer, both in jazz and classical music. As a musician, he mainly plays bass guitar, bass trombone, and piano.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Dave Brubeck and Two Generations of Brubeck, with Paul Desmond, Alto Saxophone

about_quotes.speaker: Butch Miles
about_quotes.evidence: Jerry Bergonzi was on tenor sax at the time, and Chris Brubeck was on bass and also bass trombone, and it could zoom right along great.
about_quotes.doc_title: Butch Miles interviewed by Monk Rowe and Michael Woods, Scottsdale, Arizona, March 4, 1995 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Nicki Parrott
about_quotes.evidence: I was talking to Chris on the plane... Chris Brubeck actually lives in not far from here in Wilton, I believe near where Dave lived, Dave Brubeck. Super sweet guys.
about_quotes.doc_title: Nicki Parrott interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 2, 2020 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Lamb
about_quotes.evidence: Chris Brubeck is a really great orchestral writer and has been really supportive in that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chuck Lamb interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, February 7, 2023
